murder.name: Murder <<TODO>>
murder.effect: One (1) other character in culprit's location dies. <<TODO>>

increasingUnease.name: Malaise grandissant
increasingUnease.effect: +2 Paranoïa sur un personnage, puis +1 Intrigue sur un autre personnage.

hospitalIncident.name: Incident à l’Hôpital
hospitalIncident.effect:
Si au moins 1 Intrigue sur l’Hôpital: tous les personnages sur l’Hôpital décèdent.
Si au moins 2 Intrigue sur l’Hôpital: les Protagonistes décèdent.

farawayMurder.name: Faraway Murder <<TODO>>
farawayMurder.effect: One character with at least 2 Intrigue dies. <<TODO>>

missingPerson.name: Personne disparue
missingPerson.effect: Déplacez le coupable vers un lieu (peut être le même). Puis +1 Intrigue sur ce lieu.

spreading.name: Spreading <<TODO>>
spreading.effect: Move 2 Goodwill from any character to any other character. <<TODO>>

butterflyEffect.name: Butterfly Effect <<TODO>>
butterflyEffect.effect: Put any counter on any character in culprit's location. <<TODO>>

conspiracies.name: Conspirations
conspiracies.effect: [Utiliser l’Intrigue à la place de la Paranoïa pour déclencher l’Incident] Résolvez l’Incident Meurtre ou Personne disparue.

uproar.name: Tumulte
uproar.effect:
Si au moins 1 Intrigue au Lycée: tous les personnages au Lycée décèdent.
Si au moins 1 Intrigue en Centre Ville: tous les personnages en Centre Ville décède.

fakeIncident.name: Incident truqué
fakeIncident.effect: S’il y a 2 Intrigue ou plus sur le lieu de départ du coupable, les Protagonistes décèdent.

breakthrough.name: Découverte capitale
breakthrough.effect: Le Leader choisit un lieu ou un personnage, et y retire 2 Intrigue.

fakedSuicide.name: Faux suicide
fakedSuicide.effect: Ajoutez une carte Extra sur le coupable. Pour le reste de la boucle, les Protagonistes ne peuvent jouer aucune carte sur un personnage possédant une (ou plusieurs) carte Extra.

confession.name: Confession
confession.effect: Révélez le coupable et son rôle.

portent.name: Présage
portent.effect: [La limite de Paranoïa du coupable est diminuée de 1 pour cet Incident] +1 Paranoïa sur un personnage du lieu du coupable.

terrorism.name: Terrorisme
terrorism.effect:
Si au moins 1 Intrigue en Centre Ville: tous les personnages en Centre Ville décèdent.
Si au moins 2 Intrigue en Centre Ville: les Protagonistes décèdent.

bestialMurder.name: Meurtre bestial
bestialMurder.effect: [La limite de Paranoïa du coupable est augmentée de 1 pour cet Incident] Résolvez Meurtre et Malaise grandissant, dans cet ordre. Puis augmentez la jauge Extra de 1.

aSuspiciousLetter.name: Un courrier suspect
aSuspiciousLetter.effect: Déplacez un personnage du lieu du coupable vers un lieu. Si ce personnage change de lieu, il ne peut pas se déplacer le jour suivant.

closedCircle.name: Cercle privé
closedCircle.effect: Révélez le lieu du coupable. Pendant 3 jours (en incluant celui de l’Incident), les déplacements depuis ou vers ce lieu sont annulés.

theSilverBullet.name: La balle en argent
theSilverBullet.effect: La boucle se termine après la phase Incident. Cet Incident n’augmente pas la jauge Extra. Vérifiez la victoire/défaite.

sacrilegiousMurder.name: Meurtre sacrilège
sacrilegiousMurder.effect: Un autre personnage dans le lieu du coupable décède ou +1 Intrigue sur le lieu du coupable.

theExecutioner.name: Le bourreau
theExecutioner.effect: Quand on détermine si cet Incident se déclenche, le coupable est considéré comme ayant sa limite de Paranoïa diminuée de 1. Le Leader choisit un personnage, ce personnage décède.

darkRumor.name: Sombre rumeur
darkRumor.effect: Attachez une Malédiction sur le coupable.

barricade.name: Barricade
barricade.effect: Pour chaque autre personnage dans le lieu du coupable, sélectionnez un autre lieu et déplacez-y cet autre personnage.

nightOfMadness.name: Folie nocturne
nightOfMadness.effect: [Incident de foule: 0 (se déclenche toujours)+ S’il y a au moins 6 Zombies lorsque cet Incident se déclenche, les Protagonistes décèdent après la fin de la journée.

awakenedCurse.name: Malédiction en éveil
awakenedCurse.effect: [Incident de foule: 1] Placez une Malédiction sur le lieu du coupable.

evangeliumOfTheDead.name: Evangile de la mort
evangeliumOfTheDead.effect: [Incident de foule: 2] Tous les personnages dans le lieu du coupable décèdent. Puis, s’il y a 5 cadavres ou plus sur ce lieu, les Protagonistes décèdent.

fountainOfFilth.name: Fontaine de la saleté
fountainOfFilth.effect: [Incident de foule: 2] +2 Paranoïa sur un personnage, et +1 Intrigue sur un lieu.

insaneMurder.name: Folie meurtrière
insaneMurder.effect: Un personnage dans le même lieu que le coupable décède.

massSuicide.name: Suicide de masse
massSuicide.effect: Si le coupable a 1 Intrigue ou plus, tous les personnages dans le lieu du coupable décèdent.

fireOfDemise.name: Feu du trépas
fireOfDemise.effect: La première fois que cet Incident se déclenche lors de la partie, tous les personnages et les Protagonistes décèdent.

houndDogScent.name: Flair du chien de chasse
houndDogScent.effect: [Utiliser l’Intrigue à la place de la Paranoïa pour déclencher l’Incident] Pour le reste de la boucle, si un autre Incident se déclenche, les Protagonistes décèdent.

serialMurder.name: Meurtre
serialMurder.effect: Un autre personnage dans le lieu du coupable décède.

theSealedItemBasic.name: The Sealed Item (Basic) <<TODO>>
theSealedItemBasic.plotRule: If there are at least 2 Intrigue counters on the Shrine, the Protagonists lose. <<TODO>>

signWithMe.name: Sign with me! <<TODO>>
signWithMe.plotRule: If there are at least 2 Intrigue counters on the Key Person, the Protagonists lose. <<TODO>>

changeOfFuture.name: Change of Future <<TODO>>
changeOfFuture.plotRule: If the "Butterfly Effect" incident has occurred this loop, the Protagonists lose. <<TODO>>

giantTimeBomb.name: Giant Time Bomb <<TODO>>
giantTimeBomb.plotRule: If there are at least 2 Intrigue counters on the Witch's starting location, the Protagonists lose. <<TODO>>

lightOfTheAvenger.name: Light of the Avenger <<TODO>>
lightOfTheAvenger.plotRule: If there are at least 2 Intrigue counters on the Brain's starting location, the Protagonists lose. <<TODO>>

aPlaceToProtect.name: A Place to Protect <<TODO>>
aPlaceToProtect.plotRule: If there are at least 2 Intrigue counters on the School, the Protagonists lose. <<TODO>>

theSealedItemMidnightZone.name: The Sealed Item (Midnight Zone) <<TODO>>
theSealedItemMidnightZone.plotRule: If there are at least 2 Intrigue counters on the Shrine, the Protagonists lose. <<TODO>>

secretRecord.name: Secret Record <<TODO>>
secretRecord.plotRule: If the Brain, Factor, or Magician were revealed during this loop, the Protagonists lose. <<TODO>>

maleConfrontation.name: Male Confrontation <<TODO>>
maleConfrontation.plotRule: If the Ninja (or its corpse) has at least 2 Intrigue, the Protagonists lose. <<TODO>>

fatedConnections.name: Fated Connections <<TODO>>
fatedConnections.plotRule: Choosen one character that died during the previous loop. Place any Extra Card on that character. Character(s) with an Extra card have their role changed into a Key Person. <<TODO>>

aQuiltOfIncidents.name: A Quilt of Incidents <<TODO>>
aQuiltOfIncidents.plotRule: If the Extra Gauge is 3 or more, the Protagonists lose. <<TODO>>

tightropePlan.name: Tightrope Plan <<TODO>>
tightropePlan.plotRule: If the Extra Gauge is 1 or lower, the Protagonists lose. <<TODO>>

theBlackSchool.name: The Black School <<TODO>>
theBlackSchool.plotRule: If there are at least X Intrigue on the School, the Protagonists lose. X is 1 less than the current loop number. <<TODO>>

aDropOfStrychnine.name: A Drop of Strychnine <<TODO>>
aDropOfStrychnine.plotRule: When determining whether "Serial Murder" or "Suicide" triggers, count Intrigue also as Paranoia. <<TODO>>

theOnesFromTheGrave.name: The Ones from the Grave <<TODO>>
theOnesFromTheGrave.plotRule: All corpses that had the role Person, Coward, or Show-Off change into having the role of Zombie. <<TODO>>

theCursedLand.name: The Cursed Land <<TODO>>
theCursedLand.plotRule1: You may place a Curse on the Ghost's starting location. <<TODO>>
theCursedLand.plotRule2: Unless all Location Curses can be attached to characters, you may kill the protagonists. <<TODO>>

choirToTheOutsideGod.name: Choir to the Outside God <<TODO>>
choirToTheOutsideGod.plotRule: If there are at least 5 characters with Intrigue on them, the Protagonists lose. <<TODO>>

theSacredWordsOfDagon.name: The Sacred Words of Dagon <<TODO>>
theSacredWordsOfDagon.plotRule: If there are as many or more Intrigue on the Shrine than the Extra Gauge shows, the Protagonists lose (if the Extra Gauge is at zero, the Protagonists always lose.) <<TODO>>

theKingInYellow.name: The King in Yellow <<TODO>>
theKingInYellow.plotRule: If the Extra Gauge has increased at all this loop, the Protagonists lose. <<TODO>>

giantTimeBombAgain.name: Giant Time Bomb Again <<TODO>>
giantTimeBombAgain.plotRule: If there are 2 or more Intrigue on the Witch's sstarting location, the Protagonists lose. <<TODO>>

bloodyRites.name: Bloody Rites <<TODO>>
bloodyRites.plotRule: If there are as many or more corpses as the Extra Gauge shows, the Protagonists lose. If the Extra Gauge is on zero, the Protagonists automatically lose. <<TODO>>

anUnsettlingRumorBasic.name: An Unsettling Rumor (Basic) <<TODO>>
anUnsettlingRumorBasic.mastermindAbility: You may place 1 Intrigue in any location. <<TODO>>

paranoiaVirus.name: Paranoia Virus <<TODO>>
paranoiaVirus.plotRule: All Persons with at least 3 Paranoia turn into Serial Killers. <<TODO>>

threadsOfFate.name: Threads of Fate <<TODO>>
threadsOfFate.plotRule: Place 2 Paranoia on all characters who or whose corpse had Goodwill last loop. <<TODO>>

diceOfTheGods.name: Dice of the Gods <<TODO>>
diceOfTheGods.plotRule: Choose one character that died during the previous loop and place any Extra card on that character. <<TODO>>

unsafeTrigger.name: Unsafe Trigger <<TODO>>
unsafeTrigger.mastermindAbility: Place 1 Intrigue on the (living) Factor's location. <<TODO>>

showtimeOfDeath.name: Showtime of Death <<TODO>>
showtimeOfDeath.plotRule: If there are 6 or less characters alive, the Protagonists lose. <<TODO>>

unansweredHeart.name: Unanswered Heart <<TODO>>
unansweredHeart.plotRule: "Forbid Goodwill" also has the effect of "Forbid Movement." <<TODO>>

worshippersOfTheApocalypse.name: Worshippers of the Apocalypse <<TODO>>
worshippersOfTheApocalypse.plotRule: When determining whether an Incident triggers, and the culprit is a Person, if the Prophet is alive, the culprit is regarded as having one 1 less than its printed Paranoia limit. <<TODO>>

isolatedInstitutionPsycho.name: Isolated Institution Psycho <<TODO>>
isolatedInstitutionPsycho.plotRule: If the Extra Gauge was 2 or less at the end of the previous loop, increase it by 1. <<TODO>>

smellOfGunpowder.name: Smell of Gunpowder <<TODO>>
smellOfGunpowder.plotRule: If there are a total of 12 or more Paranoia on the remaining characters, the Protagonists lose. <<TODO>>

witchsCurse.name: Witch's Curse <<TODO>>
witchsCurse.plotRule: You may place a Curse on the Witch's starting location. <<TODO>>

monsterIntrigue.name: Monster Intrigue <<TODO>>
monsterIntrigue.mastermindAbility: You may place an Intrigue on one location where a character with Goowill Refusal is. <<TODO>>

anUnsettlingRumorCosmicEvil.name: An Unsettling Rumor (Cosmic Evil) <<TODO>>
anUnsettlingRumorCosmicEvil.mastermindAbility: The Mastermind may add an Intrigue to a location of their choice. <<TODO>>

whispersFromTheDeep.name: Whispers from the Deep <<TODO>>
whispersFromTheDeep.plotRule: The Paranoiac gains all the abilities of the Key Person. <<TODO>>

keyPerson.name: Personnage clé
keyPerson.roleAbility: Protagonists lose and the loop ends immediately. <<TODO>>

killer.name: Tueur
killer.roleAbility1: If the Key Person has at least 2 Intrigue and is in the same location as the Killer, the Key Person dies. <<TODO>>
killer.roleAbility2: If this character has at least 4 Intrigue, the Protagonists die. <<TODO>>

brain.name: Cerveau
brain.roleAbility: Place 1 Intrigue on this location or character in this location. <<TODO>>

cultist.name: Cultiste
cultist.roleAbility: Ignore Forbid Intrigue effects in this location or on characters in this location. <<TODO>>

conspiracyTheorist.name: Conspirationniste
conspiracyTheorist.mastermindAbility: Place 1 Paranoia on a character in this location. <<TODO>>

serialKiller.name: Tueur en série
serialKiller.roleAbility: If there is exactly 1 other character in this location, that character dies. <<TODO>>

friend.name: Ami
friend.roleAbility1: If this character is dead, reveal its role. <<TODO>>
friend.roleAbility2: If this role has been revealed, this character gets 1 Goodwill. <<TODO>>

timeTraveller.name: Voyageur temporel
timeTraveller.roleAbility1: Ignore Forbid Goodwill for this character. <<TODO>>
timeTraveller.roleAbility2: If there are 2 Goodwill or fewer on this character, the Protagonists lose. <<TODO>>

lovedOne.name: Bien aimé
lovedOne.roleAbility2: If this character has at least 3 Paranoia and at least 1 Intrigue, the Protagonists lose. <<TODO>>

factor.name: Agent dormant
factor.roleAbility1: If there are at least 2 Intrigue on the School, this character gains the Conspiracy Theorist's ability (but not its role). <<TODO>>
factor.roleAbility2: If there are at least 2 Intrigue in the City, this character gains the Key Person's ability (but not its role). <<TODO>>

magician.name: Magicien
magician.roleAbility: Remove all Paranoia from its corpse. <<TODO>>
magician.mastermindAbility: Move one character with at least one Paranoia from this location to an adjacent location (not diagonal). <<TODO>>

ninja.name: Ninja <<TODO>>
ninja.roleAbility1: Instead of saying the truth, state any other non-Person role that is in this script. <<TODO>>
ninja.roleAbility2: If there is any character with at least 2 Intrigue in this location, you may kill that character. <<TODO>>

obstinate.name: Obstiné
obstinate.roleAbility: This character always triggers its Incidents, regardless of the amount of Paranoia on it. <<TODO>>

prophet.name: Prophète
prophet.roleAbility1: The Mastermind cannot place cards on this character. <<TODO>>
prophet.roleAbility2: When determining whether an Incident triggers, and the culprit is another character in this location, that Incident does not trigger, regardless of the number of Paranoia on the culprit. <<TODO>>

poisoner.name: Empoisonneur
poisoner.roleAbility1: If the Extra Gauge is at least 2 or more, any one character in this location dies. <<TODO>>
poisoner.roleAbility2: If the Extra Gauge is on 4 or more, the Protagonists lose. <<TODO>>

fool.name: Fou
fool.roleAbility: After this character has triggered an incident, remove all Paranoia from its card. <<TODO>>

privateInvestigator.name: Détective privé
privateInvestigator.roleAbility: If the Extra Gauge is 0, and the culprit is in this location, the Incident triggers regardless of the number of Paranoia on the culprit. <<TODO>>

paranoiac.name: Paranoïaque
paranoiac.mastermindAbility: You may place an Intrigue or Paranoia on this character. <<TODO>>

twin.name: Jumeau
twin.roleAbility: When this character triggers an incident, it is considered as being on the diagonally opposite location. <<TODO>>

therapist.name: Psychiatre
therapist.mastermindAbility: If the Extra Gauge is 1 or above, remove 1 Paranoia from any other character in this location. <<TODO>>

vampire.name: Vampire <<TODO>>
vampire.roleAbility1: If the Key Person has at least 2 Intrigue and is in this character's location, you may kill the Key Person. <<TODO>>
vampire.roleAbility2: If there are at least 2 corpses in this character's starting location, you may kill the Protagonists. <<TODO>>

werewolf.name: Loup-garou
werewolf.roleAbility1: If Night of Madness occurred this day, you may kill the Protagonists. <<TODO>>
werewolf.roleAbility2: The Mastermind cannot place cards on this character. <<TODO>>

nightmare.name: Cauchemar
nightmare.roleAbility1: You may kill one character who is in this location. <<TODO>>
nightmare.roleAbility2: If there are 3 or more Intrigue on all corpses in total, you may kill the Protagonists. <<TODO>>

ghost.name: Fantôme
ghost.mastermindAbility: If this card is a corpse, place 1 Paranoia on any character in this location, or any character in the Ghost's starting location. <<TODO>>

showOff.name: Frimeur
showOff.roleAbility: If this character has more than 2 Paranoia, they lose the Unkillable aspect and gains Mandatory Goodwill Refusal. <<TODO>>

coward.name: Lâche
coward.roleAbility: If this character has 2 or more Paranoia, pick a neighboring location and move this character there. <<TODO>>

sacrifice.name: Sacrifié
sacrifice.roleAbility1: If this character has at least 2 Intrigue and at least 2 Paranoia, you may kill all characters and the Protagonists. <<TODO>>
sacrifice.roleAbility2: When determining whether an incident for which this character is the culprit will occur, also treat Intrigue as Paranoia. <<TODO>>

deepOne.name: Profond
deepOne.roleAbility: Reveal this character's role and increase the Extra Gauge 1 step. <<TODO>>
deepOne.mastermindAbility: You may place 1 Intrigue on this location or any character in this location. <<TODO>>

witness.name: Témoin
witness.roleAbility: If this character has 4 or more Paranoia, this character dies, and the Extra Gauge increases 1 step. <<TODO>>

faceless.name: Sans visage
faceless.roleAbility1: If the Extra Gauge is 1 or less, this character gains the abilities of a Conspiracy Theorist. <<TODO>>
faceless.roleAbility2: If the Extra Gauge is 2 or more, this character gains the abilities of a Deep One. <<TODO>>

wizard.name: Sorcier
wizard.roleAbility1: If this character is dead, the Protagonists lose. <<TODO>>
wizard.roleAbility2: When this character's Goodwill ability is used, reveal this role after resolution. Then, the leader may increase the Extra Gauge 1 step. <<TODO>>

triggers.whenThisRoleIsToBeRevealed: When this Role is to be Revealed <<TODO>>

warnings.castSizeOverridden: Cast size has been overridden to {{needed}} in order to have enough for each required role. <<TODO>>
